hero.title: Manvir Singh
hero.description: Full-stack developer crafting modern web experiences. Explore my journey through innovative projects and creative solutions.

items.title: Kishan Shaathe
items.shortDesc: Developed "Kishan Saathi," a web-based platform designed to support farmers with accessible digital solutions. The application provides useful information and tools to assist in decision-making related to agriculture and resource management.  Built using modern full-stack technologies, the platform ensures a responsive and user-friendly interface. Integrated features such as real-time data handling, structured dashboards, and scalable architecture to enhance usability and performance.  Focused on solving real-world agricultural challenges by creating a reliable and efficient system that bridges the gap between technology and farming practices.

items.title: snow bytes
items.shortDesc: Developed "Snow Bytes," a modern web-based platform focused on delivering efficient and scalable digital solutions. The project showcases strong full-stack development skills with an emphasis on performance, clean UI design, and responsive user experience.  Implemented dynamic features, structured data handling, and optimized workflows to ensure smooth functionality. Designed with scalability and maintainability in mind, making it adaptable for real-world applications.  This project highlights practical problem-solving abilities and the use of modern technologies to build reliable and user-centric systems.

items.title: netcat
items.shortDesc: Developed a network utility tool using Netcat concepts to enable communication between systems over TCP/UDP protocols. The project demonstrates skills in network programming, port scanning, data transfer, and basic client-server architecture.  Implemented features such as connection handling, message exchange, and testing of network services, providing hands-on experience in cybersecurity and networking fundamentals.

items.title: stego-vault
items.shortDesc: Developed "Stego Vault," a secure application that uses steganography techniques to hide sensitive data within digital images. The project enables users to embed and extract confidential information while maintaining the visual integrity of the image.  Implemented encryption mechanisms to ensure that only authorized users can access the hidden data, combining data security with covert communication. The system supports encoding and decoding workflows, making it a practical tool for secure data storage and transmission.  Focused on cybersecurity principles such as data privacy, confidentiality, and secure communication by leveraging image-based steganography methods, where information is concealed inside media files without raising suspicion.

items.title: ASL_ToolBox_qc_v01
items.shortDesc: Developed "ASL QC Toolbox," a specialized software tool designed for quality control and analysis in advanced system workflows. The project focuses on improving accuracy, efficiency, and reliability through automated validation and data processing techniques.  Implemented modular components to handle data inspection, error detection, and performance evaluation, enabling streamlined quality assurance processes. Designed with scalability and usability in mind, the system provides structured outputs and intuitive interfaces for efficient monitoring and analysis.  This project demonstrates strong skills in software development, problem-solving, and system optimization, with an emphasis on building practical tools for real-world technical applications.

about.intro:
Hi, I’m Manvir Singh

I am a Cyber Security student at the National Forensic Science University with a strong interest in building practical and innovative technology solutions. I have experience in full-stack development, Android application development, and AI-based systems, working with modern tools and frameworks.

I enjoy developing real-world projects, including intelligent chatbots, voice cloning systems, and scalable web applications. My core areas of interest include cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and system design, where I focus on solving complex problems through structured and efficient approaches.

I believe in learning through hands-on development, contributing to meaningful projects, and continuously improving my technical skills.

I am currently focused on advancing my knowledge in AI, cybersecurity, and modern software development practices.

timeline.title: Senior Secondary School
timeline.desc: Learn the Hello World program in Python.

timeline.title: collage NFSU
timeline.desc: Experience in Java, C, and C++.

timeline.title: cyber security
timeline.desc: Felt interested in cybersecurity and started performing basic attack simulations.

timeline.title: Research Intern
timeline.desc: IIT Jodhpur and get into the quantum computing

timeline.title: Cybersecurity Trainee
timeline.desc: Completed a 1-month training at NFSU Gandhinagar in malware analysis, cybersecurity, and IT-OT systems.

experience.description:
Worked on advanced quantum cryptography research at IIT Jodhpur, focusing on Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) systems. Developed Python-based simulation and analysis tools to implement and evaluate experimental protocols such as PPKT(P) and SPDC.

Designed programmable models to assist researchers in identifying optimal parameters for QKD experiments, improving accuracy and efficiency in validation. Contributed to security analysis through algorithmic evaluation and data-driven experimentation.

Built cryptographic tools using Elliptic Curve Cryptography (ECC) for secure encryption and decryption of hash-based data. Implemented end-to-end encryption workflows with a strong emphasis on security, correctness, and practical usability.

Trained in IT and OT security at NFSU Gandhinagar, gaining hands-on experience in analyzing and simulating cyberattacks on critical infrastructure systems such as traffic control and power grids.

Worked on capturing, monitoring, and analyzing network traffic to understand attack patterns and system vulnerabilities. Developed a strong understanding of IT–OT synchronization and the impact of cyber threats on interconnected systems.

Participated in team-based Capture The Flag (CTF) challenges, achieving second rank, demonstrating strong problem-solving and defensive security skills. Also gained practical exposure to malware analysis, incident response, and system recovery techniques.
